description: Scoped so Renovate never overlaps with Dependabot: gomod, github-actions and
docker base images stay owned by .github/dependabot.yml. Renovate keeps the pinned
scanner binaries in the Dockerfile current (custom regex manager) and the pip-installed
scanners hash-locked in requirements-scanners.txt (pip-compile manager, which re-runs
the uv compile command). The Dockerfile's hardcoded binary SHA256 sums are regenerated

customManagers.description: Scanner release binaries pinned via ARG <TOOL>_VERSION (GitHub releases)

postUpgradeTasks.description: Self-hosted only: regenerate the hardcoded SHA256 sums after a binary version bump and include the change in the same commit. Requires the runner to allow this command (allowedCommands). On Mend-hosted Renovate this is skipped; the scanner-checksums CI check enforces the refresh there instead.
